Tooltip_BalloonAnimal_1: You can’t help but smile a little.
Tooltip_Beehive_AffectedByTemperature: Bees will stop working when too hot/cold.
Tooltip_Beehive_AffectedByWeather: Bees will stop working when bad weather.
Tooltip_Beehive_BaitHive:
Adding honey or beeswax as bait
so it can attract visiting bees.
Tooltip_Beehive_BuildBeehive: A building suitable for keeping bees and producing bee products.
Tooltip_Beehive_Bumblebee:
The most hardworking bee
thanks to its large body, it has excellent adaptability to temperature
but it also consumes more energy.
Tooltip_Beehive_DisassembleComb: Randomly get various bees, beeswax or honey.
Tooltip_Beehive_HiveFrame:
A beehive component
the more you have, the faster it produces honey.
Tooltip_Beehive_HoneyExtractor: Can extract honey from the hive frames.
Tooltip_Beehive_Honeybee:
The most common type of bee
they need to sleep at night
and are affected by temperature and weather conditions.
Tooltip_Beehive_IndoorInfo: The efficiency will be cut in half.
Tooltip_Beehive_NeedBeeInfo: It needs to have a bee inside to work properly.
Tooltip_Beehive_NotAffectedByTemperature: Bees will keep working despite uncomfortable temperatures.
Tooltip_Beehive_NotAffectedByTime: Bees will keep awake at night.
Tooltip_Beehive_NotAffectedByWeather: Bees will keep working even in bad weather.
Tooltip_Beehive_PlantBoostInfo: Gives a slight growth boost to plants in a %1 x %1 area.
Tooltip_Beehive_Zombee:
Fortunately, they won’t infect you
and they don’t sleep or get affected by bad weather
but their production will decrease.
Tooltip_Beehive_isNightInfo: It's time for the bees to sleep.
Tooltip_Carabiner: Can be used to attach items to backpacks
Tooltip_ClamShell: Can be opened to obtain pearls
Tooltip_Compact_Appliance: Can be installed in some vehicles and trailers
Tooltip_Compensator:
Reduces recoil, allowing faster firing rate

Tooltip_ComplexTerminator2: Recreative machine with the ROM of Terminator 2 - Judgement Day.

Tooltip_Dimitrescu: Oh, Lady Dimitrescu! Beautiful even in death. That waistline... yes!

Tooltip_FishBoneHead: Can be used for Fishing Trophies

Tooltip_GunCleaningKit: Small cleaning kit. Contains all essential items for firearm care

This item is useless, you can get rid of it :)

A rugged yet unexpectedly advanced device, it offers a wide range of features, from precise map and coordinate tracking to extreme weather forecasts.
Its radio functionality enables it to receive transmissions, though the battery only depletes when in active use for this purpose.

Warning:

Tooltip_MoreTraits_AntiqueAxe:
A rare, hardened stone axe.
Very strong and durable, but unrepairable.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_AntiqueMag1:
A limited edition magazine.
This edition teaches the taboo art of converting human corpses into useful fertilizer.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_AntiqueMag2:
A limited edition magazine.
This edition delves into home crafting recipes with Papier-Mache.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_AntiqueMag3:
A limited edition magazine.
This edition teaches how the gases produced during decomposition can be harvested and converted into usable propane.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_BloodyCrowbar: This crowbar has been shaped and refined to swing faster, deal more damage, and be fully effective in only one hand.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_BloodyItemBoost:
This crowbar has been shaped and refined to swing faster, deal more damage, and be fully effective in only one hand.
This item's stats are being boosted by one of your traits.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_Cure:
A powerful concoction capable of reversing the effects of zombification.
Can only be crafted by the most talented medical researchers.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_ItemBoost: This item's stats are being boosted by one of your traits.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_ObsidianBlade:
A rare antique sacrificial dagger.
Very powerful, but brittle.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_PackerBag:
A rare pack.
Large capacity and high weight reduction.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_PapierMacheSword:
Fun for the whole family!
Not for children under the age of four.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_Slugger:
A rare, signed aluminium baseball bat.
Weighs less, swings faster, and is more durable than a standard baseball bat.
Tooltip_MoreTraits_Thumper:
A rare stone maul.
Capable of knocking down entire crowds in one swing.
Incredibly powerful, but also extremely heavy!

Tooltip_VehicleRecycling: Dismantling a vehicle or a trailer with a propane torch will provide metal and electrical materials. <LINE> Higher Metalworking skill will retrieve more usable salvage.
Tooltip_VehicleRecycling_Passengers: Can't dismantle a vehicle with passengers inside.
Tooltip_Venkman: Peter Venkman used to wear this....
Tooltip_VorpalShard:
A sliver of dark glass, warm to the touch. It shouldn't be warm.

Found near weapons that have gone Blooded — shed like a tooth, or a scale. Press it against a Marked weapon and the marks scatter. New ones take hold. The kills stay.

Morrison's note: 'Terri found one in the grass where Rico dropped his crowbar. She picked it up and her hand wouldn't stop shaking for an hour. Said it felt like the crowbar's heartbeat.'
Tooltip_WP_ThePumpWornHazard: The pump is bad condition and may lead to fire hazard!

Tooltip_WP_craft_valveDesc: Allows to open or close water flow in a pipeline.

After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection, bullbars and racks for Bumer 36E
Tooltip_item_ATADodgeTuningMag:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection, bullbars and racks for Dadge Steals RT
Tooltip_item_ATAPetyarbuiltTuningMag:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection for Petyarbuilt 379
Tooltip_item_ATATuningChevalierSamara:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection, a bullbar and a roof rack for Chevalier Samara
Tooltip_item_ATATuningFordMustang:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection, a bullbar and a roof rack for Fjord Mustard
Tooltip_item_ATATuningMagDeRumba:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection for DeRumba Van
Tooltip_item_ATATuningMagLuton:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection for MolksAgen Luton Van
Tooltip_item_ATATuningMagUniversal:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge. You will learn
to create universal protection for windows, study the drawings of different types of trunks
and understand how to make the car bumper more lethal.
Tooltip_item_ATAVanillaTuningMag:
After reading this issue, you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to
create protection for Vanilla vehicles
Tooltip_item_AtTuningMagBus:
In this issue you will learn how to prepare your bus for the zombie apocalypse,
learn how to create protection for windows and wheels, understand how to make
an effective grill and how to make a roomy roof rack.
Tooltip_item_AtTuningMagJeep: After reading this issue you will get basic tuning knowledge and learn how to create protection, bumpers, roof rails and additional trunks for Jaap Wrungel

Instructive manual containing diagrams and common maintenance
tasks for popular boat models.

Foreign boombox. Doesn't get local radio,
but can play cassettes. Powered by batteries.

Мagazine about the most effective swimming methods. Interview with the best swimmers in the country.

Tooltip_item_damnTireRepairStrips: One of three tire repair kit components, requires repair tools and rubber solution to patch tires.
